summary: The user sought advice on their peace lily, which has yellowing leaves, and discussed their care routine, including fertilization and watering practices. They also expressed excitement about a new baby snake plant and considered adding a new succulent or aerium to their collection, asking for tips on selecting healthy plants.
facts: The user has been fertilizing their plants regularly since acquiring a snake plant six weeks ago. The user uses a moisture meter to check the soil moisture levels of their plants. The user lives in an apartment that can get chilly in the mornings, which may affect their peace lily. The user has noticed a new baby plant growing on their snake plant, indicating healthy growth. The user is considering visiting a local succulent shop this weekend to check out their selection. The user is interested in low-maintenance plants for indoor spaces, specifically succulents or aeriums.
